recommendations.title: Winter on Fire: Ukraine's Fight for Freedom
recommendations.overview: Over 93 days in Ukraine, what started as peaceful student demonstrations became a violent revolution and full-fledged civil rights movement.

recommendations.title: ExTerminators
recommendations.overview: Three women from a rage-therapy group band together to dole out justice to the men who wronged them.

recommendations.title: Until the Light Takes Us
recommendations.overview: Chronicles the history, ideology and aesthetic of Norwegian black metal, a musical subculture infamous as much for a series of murders and church arsons as it is for its unique musical and visual aesthetics. This is the first film to truly shed light

recommendations.title: One of Us
recommendations.overview: Penetrating the insular world of New York's Hasidic community, focusing on three individuals driven to break away despite threats of retaliation.

recommendations.title: Earthlings
recommendations.overview: Using hidden cameras and never-before-seen footage, Earthlings chronicles the day-to-day practices of the largest industries in the world, all of which rely entirely on animals for profit.

recommendations.title: Hail Satan?
recommendations.overview: The story of The Satanic Temple, a controversial movement that combines religion and activism with the apparent purpose of questioning the basic foundations of US society.

recommendations.title: The Red Pill
recommendations.overview: When a feminist filmmaker sets out to document the mysterious and polarizing world of the Men’s Rights Movement, she begins to question her own beliefs. Chronicling Cassie Jaye’s journey exploring an alternate perspective on gender equality, power an

recommendations.title: I Am Michael
recommendations.overview: The controversial true story of a gay activist who rejects his homosexuality and becomes a Christian pastor.

recommendations.title: Crip Camp: A Disability Revolution
recommendations.overview: Down the road from Woodstock in the early 1970s, a revolution blossomed in a ramshackle summer camp for disabled teenagers, transforming their young lives and igniting a landmark movement.

recommendations.title: My Scientology Movie
